channel.title: Teacher Plus
channel.description: The magazine for the contemporary teacher

item.title: Resolutions
item.excerpt:encoded:
Ramya Sriram
The Lifelong Learner is a monthly comic strip that illustrates how continuous learning is embedded in the human experience. The strip emphasizes that learning is not confined to just school: we learn from nature, relationships, conversations, listening, making mistakes, trying new things, and reflection. And of course, learning isn't a one-way street, it's a dynamic exchange between teacher and student, adult and child.

item.title: Ambition
item.content:encoded: Ramya Sriram
item.excerpt:encoded:
Ramya Sriram
As children we want to do many things when we grow up. But as a grown-up we have to choose to do only one of those many things, why? Is it not possible to be all that we wanted to be when we were children?

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
[{"id":"6b310a39","elType":"container","settings":[],"elements":[{"id":"14265b8d","elType":"widget","settings":{"editor":"

Ramya Sriram

"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"text-editor"}],"isInner":false}]

wp:comment.wp:comment_content: without having some clarity about what you want from your life , can there be a though/action clarity and if one keep hunting whatever comes to her mind i think he will be hunter gatherer only. Wing Commander Ramesh Kumar Managing Director Rainbow International School ,Bawani Khera , Bhiwani

item.title: Literature helps us to
item.content:encoded: Ramya Sriram
item.excerpt:encoded:
Ramya Sriram
What is literature? Come let us find out.

item.title: The Lifelong Learner: Learning to stay calm
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded: Ramya Sriram
item.excerpt:encoded:
Ramya Sriram
The Lifelong Learner is a monthly comic strip that illustrates how continuous learning is embedded in the human experience. The strip emphasizes that learning is not confined to just school: we learn from nature, relationships, conversations, listening, making mistakes, trying new things, and reflection. And of course, learning isn't a one-way street, it's a dynamic exchange between teacher and student, adult and child.

item.title: The lifelong learner: Making an impact
item.dc:creator: Kumar
item.excerpt:encoded:
Ramya Sriram
The Lifelong Learner is a monthly comic strip that illustrates how continuous learning is embedded in the human experience. The strip emphasizes that learning is not confined to just school: we learn from nature, relationships, conversations, listening, making mistakes, trying new things, and reflection. And of course, learning isn't a one-way street, it's a dynamic exchange between teacher and student, adult and child.

item.dc:creator: Kumar
item.excerpt:encoded:
Ramya Sriram
The Lifelong Learner is a monthly comic strip that illustrates how continuous learning is embedded in the human experience. The strip emphasizes that learning is not confined to just school: we learn from nature, relationships, conversations, listening, making mistakes, trying new things, and reflection. And of course, learning isn't a one-way street, it's a dynamic exchange between teacher and student, adult and child.

item.title: The Lifelong Learner: Bridging the Gap
item.dc:creator: Kumar
item.excerpt:encoded:
Ramya Sriram
The Lifelong Learner is a monthly comic strip that illustrates how continuous learning is embedded in the human experience. The strip emphasizes that learning is not confined to just school: we learn from nature, relationships, conversations, listening, making mistakes, trying new things, and reflection. And of course, learning isn't a one-way street, it's a dynamic exchange between teacher and student, adult and child.
